title: APM: SQL Injection Attack in Request
description: Detects SQL injection payloads inside APM-instrumented application requests. Matches UNION SELECT, OR 1=1, time-based blind (SLEEP), boolean-based, error-based (EXTRACTVALUE), and stacked-query patterns appearing in Request URL.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs' and (('Request URL' like '*UNION SELECT*' or 'Request URL' like '*UNION%20SELECT*' or 'Request URL' like '*UNION+SELECT*' or 'Request URL' like '*union select*' or 'Request URL' like '*union%20select*') or ('Request URL' like '*OR 1=1*' or 'Request URL' like '*OR%201%3D1*' or 'Request URL' like '*%27%20OR%201%3D1*' or 'Request URL' like '*AND 1=1*') or ('Request URL' like '*SLEEP(*' or 'Request URL' like '*BENCHMARK(*' or 'Request URL' like '*WAITFOR DELAY*') or ('Request URL' like '*EXTRACTVALUE(*' or 'Request URL' like '*UPDATEXML(*') or ('Request URL' like '*INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES*' or 'Request URL' like '*INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS*') or ('Request URL' like '*; DROP TABLE*'))
falsepositives: Documentation pages or knowledge-base articles containing SQL examples in URL query strings
Internal red-team / sqlmap penetration tests against staging APM-instrumented apps
